name: Sweet Pickled Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Serve these sweet-and-sour nibbles as cocktail food or give jars of them to friends.
2. Cook carrots in boiling water until crisp-tender. Drain.
3. Cut carrots into 3-inch-long sticks and pack upright in small hot sterilized jars.
4. Combine sugar, vinegar, water, and salt in a saucepan.
5. Tie cinnamon stick and pickling spice in cheesecloth bag and add to vinegar mixture.
6. Boil for 5 to 8 minutes.
7. Fill jars with boiling syrup, leaving ½-inch head space.
8. Adjust lids and process in boiling water bath for 30 minutes.
